title: Bridge Essay: Synchrony Across Brains.
concept: Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.

**Synchrony Across Brains.** - Annu Rev Psychol (2025). DOI: 10.1146/annurev-psych-080123-101149. PMID: 39441884. Second-person neuroscience focuses on studying the behavioral and neuronal mechanisms of real-time social interactions within single and across interacting brains. In this review article, we describe the developments that have been undertaken to study socially interactive phenomena and the behavioral and neurobiological processes that extend across interaction partners. More specifically, we focus on the role that synchrony across brains plays in enabling and facilitating social interaction and
